name: alphafold-database
description: AlphaFold DB fetch and analysis — download predicted structures (mmCIF + PAE) by UniProt ID, analyze pLDDT confidence metrics and detect domain boundaries from PAE. Vendored from the google-deepmind/science-skills bundle.
author: zorai

fetch-structure.description: Download AlphaFold predicted structure (mmCIF + PAE JSON) for a UniProt accession. Required: a valid UniProt ID. Output goes to the directory given by --output_dir.

analyze-plddt.description: Analyze pLDDT confidence metrics from a previously-fetched AlphaFold metadata JSON. Pass the path to the metadata JSON file (usually saved by fetch-structure).

python.command: python scripts/analyze_plddt.py "${AF_METADATA_FILE:?set AF_METADATA_FILE (path to AFDB metadata JSON)}"

analyze-pae.description: Analyze Predicted Aligned Error (PAE) and detect sub-domain boundaries from a PAE matrix JSON. Pass the path to the PAE JSON file (usually saved by fetch-structure).

python.command: python scripts/analyze_pae.py "${AF_PAE_FILE:?set AF_PAE_FILE (path to AFDB PAE JSON)}" ${AF_PAE_DISTANCE_CUTOFF:+--distance-cutoff $AF_PAE_DISTANCE_CUTOFF} ${AF_PAE_MIN_DOMAIN_SIZE:+--min-domain-size $AF_PAE_MIN_DOMAIN_SIZE} ${AF_PAE_OUTPUT_FILE:+--output-file $AF_PAE_OUTPUT_FILE}
